published_prior_art.cite: AronowSamii2017 gives general exposure-probability matrices; UganderKarrerBackstromKleinberg2013 gives exact algorithms for selected network-exposure conditions
Chin2018 assumes a restricted dependency graph for HT CLTs rather than deriving the degree bound from ego exposure supports
AronowSamii2017 proves exposure-mapping HT asymptotic normality under local dependence; Chin2018 proves HT CLTs under restricted dependency degree
AronowSamii2017 gives conservative variance estimators but not a sharp ego-cluster upper envelope; GaoDing2023 and ChattopadhyayImaiZubizarreta2023 are adjacent but do not solve this exact envelope

repo_prior_art.cite: standard sanity reduction to existing dependency-graph exposure-map benchmarks

published_prior_art.cite: AronowSamii2017 and Chin2018 local-dependence HT CLT benchmarks

novelty_flags.label: comparator_promise_table
novelty_flags.one_line: The table labels AronowSamii2017, UganderKarrerBackstromKleinberg2013, and Chin2018 as strict_tightening comparators, but the statements are sufficient-condition specializations rather than formal strict tightenings or iff frontiers against those published results.

novelty_flags.label: thm:ego-overlap-clt; oeq:conservative-variance
novelty_flags.one_line: The design-based network-experiment literature is missing at least ChattopadhyayImaiZubizarreta2023 on generalized network experiments with stochastic interventions, and the exposure-estimator side should also mention KungSussman2022 for additive exposure-model LUEs.

soundness_flags.label: prop:dependency-degree
soundness_flags.one_line: The bound Delta_n <= b_n(omega_n-1) <= q_n kappa_n(omega_n-1) ignores that B_in is the union of the h_n^+ and h_n^- supports, so the stated assumptions only give a 2 q_n kappa_n bound unless q_n or kappa_n is redefined for the whole contrast support.

soundness_flags.label: lem:singleton-reduction
soundness_flags.one_line: q_n = 1 and kappa_n = 1 makes each individual exposure event a single literal, but it does not force the two target-label literals to use the same cluster, so Delta_n <= omega_n - 1 need not follow.

soundness_flags.label: ass:stein-overlap-rate
soundness_flags.one_line: The condition n^(-1/2)(q_n kappa_n omega_n)^(3/2) -> 0 is tagged as the Chin2018 standard rate, but Chin's HT dependency-graph discussion states a max-degree o(n^(1/4)) restriction; either strengthen the rate or retag and justify the sharper Stein bound.

soundness_flags.label: ass:monomial-degree; ass:monomial-count; ass:bounded-ego-overlap
soundness_flags.one_line: These assumptions restate the definitions of q_n, kappa_n, and omega_n as maxima/envelopes; the real restriction is their growth rate, so the assumptions should be dropped or the symbols redefined as external deterministic envelopes.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: thm:ego-overlap-clt
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The Wald coverage claim is explicitly oracle because it uses sigma_n rather than an observed conservative variance estimator.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Advance only the conditional oracle-coverage theorem unless oeq:conservative-variance is solved.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: oeq:conservative-variance
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The sharp operational variance envelope is posed only as an open-ended question, not as an existing construction.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: No feasible non-oracle CI is claimed until a computable Vbar_n and sharpness argument are supplied.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine q_n and kappa_n for the full contrast support, or carry the missing factor 2 through prop:dependency-degree, thm:ego-overlap-clt, and lem:singleton-reduction.
Replace ass:stein-overlap-rate by the published Chin-style degree condition, or add a separate to-prove Stein lemma deriving the proposed n^(-1/2)D_n^(3/2) rate for these bounded HT summands.

Add Chattopadhyay-Imai-Zubizarreta 2023 and Kung-Sussman 2022 to related_work, and state precisely why their design-based or additive-exposure variance results do not subsume the ego-cluster envelope question.

Downgrade the comparator_promise_table entries from strict_tightening to informed_by, unless a new proposition formally recovers each comparator as a special case and proves a strictly wider primitive class.
Sharpen the variance OEQ into an explicit finite-dimensional optimization problem with variables, constraints, dimension, and the observed-data consistency constraints for Y^obs.

recommended_next_step: Continue revise on this angle: the repo novelty is clear and field-tier is plausible, but the support-size algebra, Stein-rate citation, and comparator/survey positioning must be repaired before Stage 0.
